creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)
> jbeich@ please, should we have a merge of
> 4c90553fa54204d5dd5bd2d6b5064f73f2e29e9a to quarterly?

I did plan to (after checking pkg-status for new fallout) but forgot. Patch-level updates (X.Y.Z -> X.Y.Z+1) are usually safe to merge.
